events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from UCSF Medical Center for client 1134. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: diabetic, cardiovascular. Allergies: sesame. Sodium ceiling 650 mg/meal, carbs 40–55 g/meal. Prefers Filipino; dislikes nothing noted. Cooking ability: microwave. 7 meals/week, zone Western Addition.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Rejected: Arroz Caldo
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 57 g outside 40–55 g range.

events.title: Rejected: Pancit Bihon
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 63 g outside 40–55 g range.

events.title: Matched: Low-Sodium Chicken Adobo with Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 426/650 mg ✓, carbs 52 g (target 40–55) ✓, no sesame ✓. Sourced from kitchen batch B1.

events.title: Matched: Baked Bangus with Garlic Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 396/650 mg ✓, carbs 47 g (target 40–55) ✓, no sesame ✓.

events.title: Matched: Ginataang Gulay with Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 401/650 mg ✓, carbs 51 g (target 40–55) ✓, no sesame ✓. Sourced from kitchen batch B4.

events.title: Batch allocated: Low-Sodium Chicken Adobo with Rice
events.detail: Serving drawn from scheduled batch B1 (20 servings, 2 labor hours on 2026-07-20).

events.title: Donation D001 feeds batch B1
events.detail: Jasmine Rice (50 lb sacks) from Golden State Rice Cooperative — triaged as kitchen ingredient.

events.title: Batch allocated: Ginataang Gulay with Rice
events.detail: Serving drawn from scheduled batch B4 (30 servings, 3 labor hours on 2026-07-20).

events.title: Batch allocated: Chicken Congee with Scallions
events.detail: Serving drawn from scheduled batch B2 (120 servings, 10 labor hours on 2026-07-20).

events.title: Donation D002 feeds batch B2
events.detail: Fresh Bok Choy (cases), Carrots (25 lb bags) from Bay Area Produce Exchange — triaged as kitchen ingredient.

events.title: Batch allocated: Overnight Oats with Berries
events.detail: Serving drawn from scheduled batch B7 (110 servings, 10 labor hours on 2026-07-20).

events.title: Pickup scheduled
events.detail: Meals for client 1134 ready for pickup 2026-07-21, window 10:00–12:00 (Western Addition group). Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1134: 7 compliant meal(s) at fallback level 1. 0 hard-constraint violations.
